Sun and Moon are sometimes neutral. All other planets are
friendly.
NEUTRAL ASPECTS
As mentioned above, some neutral aspects (relationships)
are there and they are delineated below : -
Moon with Jupiter brings change of place, accusations.
Moon + Saturn : - While Saturn indicates work Moon
indicates change. Place of work of the native is subject to change
resulting in profitable or non-profitable aspects.

34 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY
Moon+ Mercury :-Mercuty is intellect and Moon is Mind
indicating waveriness and intellect is spread in various forms/fields.
Sun + Dragon tail :- Dragon Tail is neutral as mentioned
above .. Sun indicating government and status; and Tail indicating
flag. This combination indicates Social Status and/or political
status. Sometimes may become the cause of obstruction for the
prosperity of the native, depending upon the other planetary
aspects and conjunctions.
